team_name: NyayaSetu — AI-Powered Court Judgment to Action Plan System
summary: Develop an AI system that reads court judgement PDFs, extracts key information, generates a structured action plan, and presents human-verified data in a dashboard for government use.
key_steps: Extracts case number, order date, directives, parties, and timelines
Presents extracted data with source highlights for human verification
Only verified records flow into a department-wise action dashboard
optimization_claims: Reduces review time from hours to minutes
Creates a full audit trail for every directive
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
